warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 1) cuts along the width direction (parallel to grid1/grid2/grid3), through the stair/hall/bathroom sequence — โถง+ห้องน้ำ(ground)/โถง+นอน2(upper), with the stair flight visible rising through the center of the section.
Sibling sections รูปตัด 2 and รูปตัด 3 are in _หน้า14_section2.json and _หน้า15_section3.json (not yet read at time of writing this file).

The upper 'โถง' room box reads '2 +4.10 1' — the +4.10 level is higher than this same sheet's own printed 2nd-floor datum (+3.75, in the ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 label at left). Not reconciled: could be a genuine raised threshold/sub-landing at the top of the stair within โถง, or a misread digit (4.10 vs a possible 3.10/3.75) — flagged for human review rather than silently corrected to match the datum.
Roof framing itself is deferred to the structural drawings (outside this extraction's architecture-only page range 03-29), consistent with the 'โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง' note.
Two small circled '1' cutting-plane markers appear beside the 'รูปตัด 1' title at the bottom of the sheet — standard section-identification symbol, not treated as a separate building element.
